ment is also ready 10 do much for

He urged the building Of canals
that will not lose so much water by
stepage.- This water can be saved by
lining and Turning canals. and If done,
At least ne-third more land can be
reclaimed BY irrigation with the
water than would otherwise be lost.
The department is collecting all the
available data on this subject and Is
ready to distribute some to the irri-
gators for their education. 1t will
be boiled down ana sent out in irri-
cation and agricultural bulletins.
